case_title: STATE FARM BANK VS. ROBERT DOUGLAS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF FLINT C. ZIDE RE: WAIVER OF INTEREST EXCESS OF 0% AND ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM BANK
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE FARM BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-05-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $493.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, ROBERT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 100031414) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM BANK AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, ROBERT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM BANK AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, ROBERT DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-16-2012
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET, ADR PACKAGE, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM BANK SERVED OCT-22-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, ROBERT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE FARM BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, ROBERT $15,050.62 PRINCIPAL, $493.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,544.12, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-05-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM BANK AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, ROBERT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE
